title: citrus × aurantium subf. sekitoyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. sekitoyu, also known as sour orange or wild orange, is a hybrid plant species within the Rutaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. sekitoyu include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to help with wound healing and skin issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
